testcase.name: test_bulk_inventory_admin

failure.message: assert 1 >= 2 + where 1 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa49d3b66f80>('upserted', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa49d3b66f80> = {'errors': [{'error': "E11000 duplicate key error collection: test_database.inventory index: product_id_1 dup key: { product_id: null }, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 11000, 'errmsg': 'E11000 duplicate key error collection: test_database.inventory index: product_id_1 dup key: { product_id: null }', 'keyPattern': {'product_id': 1}, 'keyValue': {'product_id': None}}", 'row': 3}], 'upserted': 1}.get + where {'errors': [{'error': "E11000 duplicate key error collection: test_database.inventory index: product_id_1 dup key: { product_id: null }, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 11000, 'errmsg': 'E11000 duplicate key error collection: test_database.inventory index: product_id_1 dup key: { product_id: null }', 'keyPattern': {'product_id': 1}, 'keyValue': {'product_id': None}}", 'row': 3}], 'upserted': 1} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: E assert 1 >= 2 + where 1 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa49d3b66f80>('upserted', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa49d3b66f80> = {'errors': [{'error': "E11000 duplicate key error collection: test_database.inventory index: product_id_1 dup key: { product_id: null }, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 11000, 'errmsg': 'E11000 duplicate key error collection: test_database.inventory index: product_id_1 dup key: { product_id: null }', 'keyPattern': {'product_id': 1}, 'keyValue': {'product_id': None}}", 'row': 3}], 'upserted': 1}.get + where {'errors': [{'error': "E11000 duplicate key error collection: test_database.inventory index: product_id_1 dup key: { product_id: null }, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 11000, 'errmsg': 'E11000 duplicate key error collection: test_database.inventory index: product_id_1 dup key: { product_id: null }', 'keyPattern': {'product_id': 1}, 'keyValue': {'product_id': None}}", 'row': 3}], 'upserted': 1} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json
